General.Name: Finexia Financial Group Ltd
General.Description: Finexia Financial Group Limited operates as a specialist private credit provider focusing on delivering income returns in Australia. The company operates through Stockbroking and Corporate Advisory; Funds and Asset Management; and Private Credit segments. It offers commercial lending; share market trading services comprising equities, options, foreign exchange, commodities, and CFDs; and Security-backed lending. The company also provides childcare centre loans, such as loans, leases, and asset finance; childcare income fund; stay company income fund. In addition, it offers trading, algorithmic and sale trading, multi-asset custody, prime financing, and research, advice and insights. The company was formerly known as Mejority Capital Limited and changed its name to Finexia Financial Group Limited in September 2020. Finexia Financial Group Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
